description: Composition Green round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, branding in metallic embellishments on the chest, and brand name and logo printed on the back Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water below 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Combining sport and style is adidas' forte. This T-shirt has a slim shape offering a flattering silhouette, making it a favourite for all body types. Wear this classic style with form fitting denims and colourful sports shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
